rules.ruleDescription: HYPER+TAB hold -> Rectangle Pro next display/space
SUPER+TAB hold -> Rectangle Pro prev display/space

to_if_alone.shell_command: if pgrep -x 'Spotify' > /dev/null; then open 'raycast://extensions/mattisssa/spotify-player/togglePlayPause'; else ~/.local/bin/open-app -b 'com.spotify.client'; fi; echo 'Spotify toggled'

to_if_canceled.shell_command: if pgrep -x 'Spotify' > /dev/null; then open 'raycast://extensions/mattisssa/spotify-player/togglePlayPause'; else ~/.local/bin/open-app -b 'com.spotify.client'; fi; echo 'Spotify toggled'

rules.ruleDescription: RIGHT_OPTION+T hold -> Edit last Typinator expansion

manipulatorSources.description: Left CMD second tap -> last app
ESCAPE - ESC (tap), kill foreground (hold), kill unresponsive (tap-tap-hold)
ESCAPE - ESC (tap), kill foreground (hold), kill unresponsive (tap-tap-hold)

rules.ruleDescription: ESCAPE - ESC (tap), kill foreground (hold), kill unresponsive (tap-tap-hold)

manipulatorSources.description: LEFT CTRL + ESCAPE - Activity Monitor (tap), Process Spy (hold)

rules.ruleDescription: LEFT CTRL + ESCAPE - Activity Monitor (tap), Process Spy (hold)
CAPS - HSLAUNCHER (alone), HYPER (hold), SUPER (with shift), MEH (with ctrl)
SPACE - tap for key, hold for layer

to.shell_command: ~/.local/bin/uv --directory ~/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py lowercase --source clipboard --dest paste
~/.local/bin/uv --directory ~/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py sentence_case --source clipboard --dest paste
~/.local/bin/uv --directory ~/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py title_case --source clipboard --dest paste
~/.local/bin/uv --directory ~/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py uppercase --source clipboard --dest paste
sleep 0.2 && ~/.local/bin/uv --directory ~/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py wrap_braces --source clipboard --dest paste
sleep 0.2 && ~/.local/bin/uv --directory ~/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py wrap_parentheses --source clipboard --dest paste
sleep 0.2 && ~/.local/bin/uv --directory ~/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py wrap_quotes --source clipboard --dest paste
sleep 0.2 && ~/.local/bin/uv --directory ~/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py wrap_brackets --source clipboard --dest paste

manipulatorSources.description: Tilde - self (tap), Hyper+F5 down (tap-hold down), Hyper+F5 up (tap-hold up)

rules.ruleDescription: Right_Option + Key - App launch or focus
WORD - CMD+/ copy document name and elevate privileges
